full_text:
Guo Yuan (Zini) 國淵 (子尼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Yuan (國淵), styledZini (子尼), was born in Le’an. Student of Zheng Xuan who described Zini as a state treasure. Impressed with honest counsel. Guo Yuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
